steps.title: Use the point on the graph
steps.content:
Since the graph passes through $(-4,0)$, substituting $x=-4$ must make $h(x)=0$.
$$0=(-4+p)(-4-3)(2(-4)-10)$$

steps.title: Find the value of p
steps.content:
The last two factors are not $0$, so the first factor must be $0$.
$$-4+p=0$$
$$p=4$$

steps.title: Evaluate at zero
steps.content:
Now substitute $x=0$ into the function.
$$h(0)=(0+4)(0-3)(2(0)-10)$$
$$h(0)=4(-3)(-10)=120$$
This matches choice D. The answer is D.
